entities.name: NITROGEN FIXATION
entities.description: The process of converting atmospheric nitrogen into a usable form, specifically symbiotic biological nitrogen fixation.

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The host plant species used in the study of nitrogen fixation.

entities.name: RHIZOBIUM
entities.description: The symbiotic bacterial strain that interacts with the host plant to enable nitrogen fixation.

entities.name: PLANT GENOME
entities.description: The genetic makeup of the host plant that influences nitrogen fixation.

entities.name: ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: The external conditions that affect the symbiotic interaction and nitrogen fixation process.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The research organization where the studies are being conducted.
